metadata.description: Skills for working with open energy system data from Catalyst Cooperative's Public Utility Data Liberation (PUDL) project, and to provide support to developers and open source contributors working on the open source data processing pipeline.

plugins.name: frictionless-datapackage
plugins.description: Navigate metadata and load data described by Frictionless Data Packages.

plugins.name: pudl-data
plugins.description: Work with open energy system data distributed through the Public Utility Data Liberation (PUDL) project.

plugins.name: pudl-dev
plugins.description: Agent support for developers contributing to the Public Utility Data Liberation (PUDL) project.
